serviceDescription: Amazon Chime lets you meet, chat, and collaborate with the security of AWS. You can work seamlessly on your devices, and meet from your desk or on the go - ensuring you always stay connected.

templates.description: Quick estimate: Use the quick estimate for a fast route to a rough estimate.

cards.title: Chime Conferencing*
cards.helpText: Amazon Chime is a pay-as-you-go communications service with no upfront fees, commitments, or long-term contracts.
cards.bodyText: *Cost Comparison is based on the average current cost per user per month for Chime. You’re only charged for Amazon Chime Pro features on the days your users access them

cards.title: Chime Voice Connector analysis
cards.helpText: Amazon Chime is a pay-as-you-go communications service with no upfront fees, commitments, or long-term contracts.
cards.bodyText: Amazon Chime Voice Connector enables you to connect your on-premises phone systems to the Public Switched Telephone Network (PSTN) and Chime meetings service, replacing your legacy network. Voice Connector is available for inbound calling only, outbound calling only, or both inbound and outbound calling.

cards.title: Chime Business Calling analysis
cards.helpText: Amazon Chime is a pay-as-you-go communications service with no upfront fees, commitments, or long-term contracts.
cards.bodyText: Amazon Chime Business Calling enables low-cost public switched telephone network (PSTN) calling and texting for enterprise customers using the Chime mobile, desktop, and web apps.
